name: classification from answer text is word-boundary safe so an answer word does not misfire a short signal
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --answer "notes=we prevent content leaks and value accreditation" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(["azure-platform","container-orchestration","ci-cd"].any?{|t|c["workload_types"].include?(t)} ? 1:0)' && echo answers-boundary-safe 1>&2
